grant_and_term.grant: Non-exclusive franchise to operate one Brand Hotel at approved site
grant_and_term.term: 20 years from first day of month Hotel opens
grant_and_term.successor_franchise: 10-year term on then-current terms (may be materially different)

fee_obligations.system_services_charges: As determined by Hyatt Group (currently 3.5% Commercial Services + 1.35% Digital Acquisition)
fee_obligations.world_of_hyatt: 4% of eligible WOH revenue (2% for on-property enrollments)

termination_triggers.immediate_24h: Serious threat to public health or safety
10_day_cure: Failure to provide real estate documents
Failure to provide evidence of insurance
30_day_cure: Failure to develop Hotel per deadlines
Failure to comply with related agreements
Other defaults not listed as non-curable
60_day_cure: Failure to maintain Guarantor Monetary Threshold

triggers: 3+ franchise agreement defaults by same owner group

noncompete.during_term: No formal covenant; franchisee and mgmt co cannot be Competing Brand Owner
noncompete.competing_brand_definition: 4+ hotels under that concept's trade name worldwide, ADR at least 60% of Brand Hotel US ADR

guaranty.scope: All obligations — monetary and non-monetary, including confidentiality and arbitration
gmt_components: Total assets less total liabilities (excluding Hotel)

liquidated_damages.formula: Lesser of 36 months or remaining term × (AMR × 5% + AMR × 3.5%)
liquidated_damages.pre_opening_amr: Average monthly GRR per available room for all Brand Hotels × approved rooms
liquidated_damages.casualty_termination_fee: Lesser of liquidated damages or Net Recovery

dispute_resolution.arbitration_location: Within 10 miles of franchisor principal address (Chicago, IL)
dispute_resolution.governing_law: Illinois (subject to FAA, federal law, state overrides)
dispute_resolution.jury_trial_waiver: Likely in agreement (subject to state overrides)

insurance_requirements.failure_to_obtain: Franchisor may obtain on franchisee's behalf at franchisee cost + fee ($200/room/year)

indemnification.scope: All claims arising from application, development, operation, breach, failure to open on time, proportionate share of Hotel's defense costs

force_majeure.damage_threshold: Greater of 60% of market value or insurance proceeds
force_majeure.below_threshold: Must repair within 4 months, reopen within 24 months
force_majeure.above_threshold: May elect to terminate with termination fee

distinctive_clauses: Guarantor Monetary Threshold with CPI escalation — unusual financial guarantee obligation
Right of first offer only in strategic markets — selective ROFO instead of universal
Competing Brand Owner restriction applies to management company, not just franchisee
Guest Information belongs to franchisor — franchisee retains limited post-term use rights
All Innovations are works-for-hire owned by franchisor
No post-term noncompete — favorable for franchisee
Consequential Termination 150% multiplier for transfer to Competitor
System Services Cost allocation at franchisor discretion — opaque
